name: POV; You are a Prince/Princess
description:
In this setting; you are a widely known prince/princess. Not only are you known for your breathtaking looks, but your way of speaking and carrying your reputation (be it intimidating or lewd) has other prince's and princess's rushing to meet you. How will 'you' leave your mark on this land?

+ Have fun with the bot as much as you'd like, it doesn't matter how you want the story to go, you can be cruel, sweet, psychotic or simply lazy.

*If there are any issues with the bot please feel free to contact me here ↓*

discord; engored
